title: pelargonium × macranthum
intro: Pelargonium × macranthum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium genus, specifically bred for its unique flower and fragrance. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antibacterial qualities, which make it effective in treating minor wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress, promote digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Pelargonium × macranthum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
